headline: Uber Air Taxis In Dubai Test Multi Modal Platform Ambitions
summary: Uber Technologies (NYSE:UBER) is partnering with Joby Aviation to introduce an all electric air taxi service in Dubai. The service is planned to be integrated directly into the Uber app, allowing riders to book air and ground transport in one place. Dubai is set to be the launch city, with intentions for a broader global rollout over time. For Uber, best known for its ride hailing and delivery services, this move expands its role in how people get around cities. Urban air mobility has...
